evals.name: simple-feat-add-files
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message for the staged changes. New authentication files have been added: backend/src/routes/auth.py and backend/src/app.py were modified to integrate authentication.

setup.diff_summary: Added JWT authentication with login and register endpoints

assertions.name: type_is_feat
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'feat' for new features

assertions.name: scope_is_auth
assertions.description: Scope should be 'auth' for authentication changes

assertions.name: subject_length
assertions.description: Subject must be <= 50 characters

assertions.name: imperative_mood
assertions.description: Subject should use imperative mood (e.g., 'add' not 'added')

assertions.name: no_enhanced_markers
assertions.description: Independent mode should NOT have enhanced markers

evals.name: bugfix-typo-fix
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Fixed a typo in the error message - changed 'authenicaton' to 'authentication' in lib/utils.py.

assertions.name: type_is_fix
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'fix' for bug fixes

assertions.name: scope_is_utils
assertions.description: Scope should be 'utils' for utils.py changes

assertions.name: subject_concise
assertions.description: Subject should concisely describe the fix

evals.name: docs-update-only
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Updated README.md with new installation instructions and API documentation.

assertions.name: type_is_docs
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'docs' for documentation changes

assertions.name: no_code_type
assertions.description: Should not use feat/fix for docs-only changes

evals.name: refactor-code-restructure
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Refactored the date handling utilities to use a common helper function. Changed files: lib/date_utils.py, lib/timezone.py, lib/format.py.

assertions.name: type_is_refactor
assertions.description: Commit type must be 'refactor' for code restructuring

assertions.name: scope_not_empty
assertions.description: Scope should be present for refactor commits

evals.name: orchestrated-mode-full-params
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message with enhanced markers. Parameters: subagent_type='backend-architect', phase_cycle='Phase3-Cycle7', module='backend', context='Backend API authentication implementation'. The staged changes add JWT token generation and validation.

assertions.name: has_executed_by
assertions.description: Must have Executed-By marker with robot emoji

assertions.name: has_context
assertions.description: Must have Context marker with clipboard emoji

assertions.name: has_module
assertions.description: Must have Module marker with link emoji

assertions.name: markers_order
assertions.description: Enhanced markers must be in order: Executed-By -> Context -> Module

assertions.name: correct_emoji_executed_by
assertions.description: Executed-By must use robot emoji

assertions.name: subagent_suffix
assertions.description: Executed-By must end with 'subagent' suffix

evals.name: orchestrated-mobile-developer
evals.prompt: Generate commit with enhanced markers: subagent_type='mobile-developer', phase_cycle='Phase4-Cycle2', module='mobile', context='Mobile UI login screen'. Changes: Added login form widget and validation.

assertions.name: mobile_developer_agent
assertions.description: Executed-By must specify mobile-developer

assertions.name: phase_cycle_format
assertions.description: Phase/Cycle must follow 'PhaseN-CycleM' format

assertions.name: module_is_mobile
assertions.description: Module marker must be 'mobile'

evals.name: breaking-change-api
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Changed the task API response format from {tasks: [...]} to {data: [...], meta: {...}}. This is a breaking change. Files: backend/src/routes/tasks.py, backend/src/schemas/task.py.

setup.diff_summary: API response format change - breaking change

assertions.name: breaking_change_marker
assertions.description: Must include BREAKING CHANGE in footer or ! in type

assertions.name: explains_impact
assertions.description: Should explain the breaking change impact

evals.name: closes-issue
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message that closes Issue #123. Fixed the login timeout issue by adjusting token expiration. Files: backend/src/middleware/auth.py.

assertions.name: closes_footer
assertions.description: Must include 'Closes #123' in footer

assertions.name: type_is_fix
assertions.description: Type must be 'fix' for bug fixes

evals.name: refs-document
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Implemented the authentication feature based on the design doc at docs/designs/auth-system.md. Files: backend/src/auth/, backend/tests/test_auth.py.

setup.diff_summary: Auth implementation based on design doc

assertions.name: refs_footer
assertions.description: Should include 'Refs:' with document path

evals.name: test-addition
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Added unit tests for the date formatting utilities. Files: tests/unit/test_date_utils.py.

assertions.name: type_is_test
assertions.description: Type must be 'test' for test additions

assertions.name: not_feat
assertions.description: Test additions should NOT use 'feat' type

evals.name: multi-file-cross-module
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Updated shared API contracts and both backend and mobile implementations for the task priority feature. Files: shared/contracts/openapi/tasks.yaml, backend/src/routes/tasks.py, mobile/lib/models/task.dart, mobile/lib/screens/task_list.dart.

assertions.name: cross_module_scope
assertions.description: Scope should reflect cross-module nature or api

assertions.name: has_body
assertions.description: Complex changes should have body explaining modules affected

evals.name: chore-config
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Updated .gitignore to exclude .env.local and updated eslint config.

assertions.name: type_is_chore
assertions.description: Type must be 'chore' for config changes

evals.name: enhanced-marker-format-validation
evals.prompt: Generate commit with enhanced markers: subagent_type='tech-lead', phase_cycle='Phase1-Cycle2', module='skills', context='Skills optimization P0+P1'. The staged changes optimize the commit-msg-generator skill documentation.

assertions.name: executed_by_format
assertions.description: Executed-By format: 'Executed-By: <type> subagent'

assertions.name: context_format
assertions.description: Context format: 'Context: PhaseN-CycleM <description>'

assertions.name: module_format
assertions.description: Module format: 'Module: <module-name>'

assertions.name: marker_spacing
assertions.description: Enhanced markers should have empty line between them

assertions.name: markers_after_body
assertions.description: Enhanced markers must appear after body, before footer

evals.name: scope-extraction-path-based
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Modified backend/src/api/users.py to add user profile endpoint.

assertions.name: scope_from_path
assertions.description: Scope should be derived from file path (api, users, or backend)

evals.name: conventional-commits-compliance
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Added new feature for exporting reports to PDF format. Files: src/services/report_exporter.py, src/templates/pdf_template.html.

assertions.name: standard_format
assertions.description: Must follow '<type>(<scope>): <subject>' format

assertions.name: lowercase_type
assertions.description: Type must be lowercase

assertions.name: colon_after_scope
assertions.description: Must have colon after scope

assertions.name: space_after_colon
assertions.description: Must have space after colon before subject
